description: Confounder: The model assumes kaiming_uniform_ would be avoided entirely for gate_proj/up_pr

_meta.explanation: The rule 'SwiGLUExperts.reset_parameters initializes gate_proj and up_proj weights with std=1/sqrt(hidden_size), not using kaiming_uniform_'s default fan_in computation, because it would incorrectly treat the first dimension of (num_experts, hidden_size, intermediate_dim) as fan_out.' does NOT hold here. The model assumes kaiming_uniform_ would be avoided entirely for gate_proj/up_proj, but here it's mistakenly used instead of normal_ with the custom std
_meta.curriculum_note: Rule 'SwiGLUExperts.reset_parameters initializes gate_proj and up_proj weights with std=1/sqrt(hidden_size), not using kaiming_uniform_'s default fan_in computation, because it would incorrectly treat the first dimension of (num_experts, hidden_size, intermediate_dim) as fan_out.' holds in the obvious case but breaks here. Distractor B is the hard negative — the rule naively applied.
